properties.displayName: Cross Workspace Test - sentinel-eus2 and spoke-sentinel1 data present
properties.description: テスト目的の分析ルールです。sentinel-eus2 から spoke-sentinel1 をクロスワークスペース参照し、両ワークスペースに直近 24 時間の Usage データが存在する場合にアラートとインシデントを生成します。検証完了後は無効化してください。
properties.query:
let Lookback = 24h;
let WorkspaceUsage =
union isfuzzy=true
(
    Usage
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | summarize IngestedMB = round(sum(Quantity), 3), UsageRecords = count(), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by DataType
    | extend SourceWorkspace = 'sentinel-eus2'
),
(
    workspace('1f1f7c40-4bb1-454b-a124-c104d400069b').Usage
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | summarize IngestedMB = round(sum(Quantity), 3), UsageRecords = count(), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by DataType
    | extend SourceWorkspace = 'spoke-sentinel1'
);
WorkspaceUsage
| summarize Workspaces = make_set(SourceWorkspace), WorkspaceCount = dcount(SourceWorkspace), DataTypes = make_set(DataType, 50), TotalIngestedMB = round(sum(IngestedMB), 3), TotalUsageRecords = sum(UsageRecords), LastSeen = max(LastSeen)
| where WorkspaceCount >= 2
| extend TimeGenerated = LastSeen
| extend TestScenario = 'Cross workspace query and incident creation validation', HubWorkspace = 'sentinel-eus2', SpokeWorkspaceName = 'spoke-sentinel1', WorkspacesObserved = strcat_array(Workspaces, ','), DataTypeSample = tostring(DataTypes)
| project TimeGenerated, TestScenario, HubWorkspace, SpokeWorkspaceName, WorkspacesObserved, WorkspaceCount, TotalIngestedMB, TotalUsageRecords, DataTypeSample, LastSeen

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: Cross workspace test fired: sentinel-eus2 and spoke-sentinel1
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Cross workspace Usage data was found in both workspaces. Total MB: {{TotalIngestedMB}}, records: {{TotalUsageRecords}}.
